src: A Meowth pokemon toy sitting and waving hands, in hyper-realistic anime-inspired style. It has oversized embroidered eyes and sharply defined lines around its face and limbs.
edit: A Meowth Pokémon toy sitting and waving hands energetically in Pop-Art style, with bold block colors, oversized eyes outlined in black, exaggerated expressions, and highlighted limbs with dramatic contours.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The Pokemon is on a dark wooden table in the room corner, viewed slightly from above, with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from above, placed on a white metal lattice in a room corner with plain white walls.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: A Pokemon is lying on a black background.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The Pokémon is viewed slightly from below, sitting on a metal stick, with one leg hanging down and one partially hidden, against a plain white background.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: A vibrant Pop-Art style Pokémon is depicted slightly from above on a neon-colored table with bold outlines. The background features geometric patterns on high-contrast walls. The Pokémon has saturated colors and thick black contours against the lively backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: A colorful Pokemon viewed from a slightly elevated angle on a vibrant, multicolored metal lattice in a room corner. The lattice has bold graphic patterns of pop-art, with walls adorned in large, retro-inspired comic book elements in bright primary colors.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The Pokémon appears vibrant on a colorful Pop-Art style background with primary colors, contrasts, and comic book elements. It has exaggerated features and thick black outlines, enhanced by dots, stripes, and symbols in the scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: A pop-art Pokemon is portrayed from a lower angle on a colored metallic stick with one bold leg down, the other obscured. The background is white with thick outlines and bright hues, giving a comic strip feel.
